{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032012274066F03113EDD1C678C132"}"},"total":6826},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7048230554130727710","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"和其他的玄幻书有相同，也有不同。但最吸引的主角面对危险时那份舍我其谁的态度和临危不惧，有条不紊的做事风格。人物塑造很成功,形象很鲜明。但希望作者更新快一些。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1641044058,"group_id":"6967225901427723277","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3k/5nFgCvPRDrj4MpuggaU=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530160&x-signature=vBZRQcVlb%2BMBxSNfqFj9EkeoKP4%3D","user_id":"387445386917534","user_name":"爱吃水族九仟酒的陈嘉"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"387445386917534","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6967225901427723277","book_info":{"abstract":"落魄家族少爷叶无双，入赘大婚之夜，却被诬陷对自己小姨子图谋不轨，含恨而死之际，融合前世天帝记忆，彻底觉醒。
昔年的仇敌，如今稳坐天界之巅。
曾经的弟子，亦是成为绝代强者。
往日的红颜，依旧翘首盼君归来。
万古往来无有我，又有谁人敢称王？
且看叶无双此生一人一剑，再回巅峰，杀三千神，诛十方魔，问鼎万界，成为不朽的万古之王！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/08cc70ce13ebbc83a1b0fcda3971efd8","author":"飞天神牛","author_id":"","book_id":"6967225901427723277","book_name":"万古之王","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#201010","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"15.2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":258,"name":"传统玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=258&name=传统玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6967329940849033735","read_count":"151249","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"7161219"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"3938","tags":"传统玄幻,玄幻,重生,诸天万界,无脑爽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-images/31de0e897bf6631c9da8000ed00977c1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779164860&x-signature=a7GMP0%2FKBVW%2FCfxanidAFEnJdeg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.5062288e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032012274066F03113EDD1C678C132"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读10小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":166,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":35061,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":63210},"user_action":{"
